route53recoveryreadiness.recoverygroup.C: Creates a recovery group in an account. A recovery group corresponds to an application and includes a list of the cells that make up the application.

route53recoveryreadiness.recoverygroup.C.Description: A list of the cell Amazon Resource Names (ARNs) in the recovery group.

route53recoveryreadiness.recoverygroup.R.Description: The name of the recovery group to create.

route53recoveryreadiness.recoverygroup.T.Description: A collection of tags associated with a resource.
